quotes: The new navigation is a bit confusing, took me 5 minutes to find the watchlist.
Getting logged out every time I minimize the app. Please fix!
Charts are taking forever to load on 5G. Needs optimization.
actions: Redesign bottom navigation for better accessibility
Fix session persistence bug in Android variant
Implement chart data pre-fetching

quotes: Option chain needs better sorting options. Hard to find strikes.
Dark mode finally! But the green text is hard to read against the black.
Price alerts are delayed by 30 seconds. Critical for scalping.
actions: Add Strike Price filters to Option Chain
Adjust Dark Mode color contrast for accessibility
Upgrade alert microservice for sub-second latency

quotes: SIP installment failed but money deducted. Support is slow.
Love the new portfolio diversification chart, very helpful!
KYC verification is stuck for 3 days. Can't start investing.
actions: Automate SIP failure refunds
Add 'Sector-wise' breakdown to Portfolio Insights
Increase KYC backend processing capacity

quotes: Chatbot keeps going in circles. Need to talk to a human.
App crashed twice during market open. Lost money on a trade.
The basic investing videos are great! More advanced stuff please.
actions: Implement direct human-agent handover in support chat
Optimize startup memory footprint to prevent crashes
Launch 'Advanced Trading' video series

quotes: FaceID is intermittent. Sometimes works, sometimes doesn't.
Sell order took 2 seconds to place. Market moved against me.
Wallet balance doesn't refresh automatically after adding funds.
actions: Update Biometric SDK for better reliability
Implement WebSocket-based order confirmations
Auto-refresh wallet state on successful transaction hook

quotes: Tax P&L report is missing intraday charges breakdown.
Referral bonus not credited after my friend joined.
IPO application button was grayed out until 11 AM.
actions: Add granular charge breakdown to Tax P&L exports
Fix referral credit validation logic
Optimize IPO bidding window availability

quotes: Basket orders are great, but need a 'Delete All' button.
Stop loss input is tiny. Hard to type while in a rush.
News feed is full of generic stuff. Need stock-specific news.
actions: Add 'Clear Basket' functionality
Enlarge input fields in Order Window
Filter News Feed based on user's Watchlist

quotes: This application is very very simplified my trading journey. only just one click to option buying and selling.
I sold share's of 1700 rs and recieve 1600 in account 100 rs deducted as brokerage.
very good app I personally recommend for trading thank you Groww team
actions: Improve the user interface and simplify the trading process
Review and adjust fees and charges to be more transparent
Enhance security measures to prevent unauthorized transactions
